title: Fail link init closed on entropy error
description: Change lichen_link_init to obtain entropy before context mutation, return -EIO on Zephyr/POSIX/unsupported-platform failure, document the contract, and add a deterministic host POSIX fault-injection CTest proving success mapping and failure non-mutation.
acceptance_criteria: lichen_link_init returns -EIO without modifying context when entropy fails; successful fixed entropy maps to epoch 128+(byte&0x7f); header documents errors; host POSIX fault test passes; three reviews pass.
notes: Completed in d73e48827. lichen_link_init now acquires entropy before context/mutex mutation and returns -EIO on all entropy failures; unsupported key generation also fails at runtime. Added strict-C11 host getentropy fault oracle wired into interop CI. Default and Release CTests pass; three final reviews found no issues. Linux CI remains pending.
close_reason: Completed in d73e48827; link init fails closed before context mutation
